name: Novas Descobertas Association
description: Novas Descobertas Association is a Portuguese educational NGO founded in 1994, based at Campo do Vale, Quinta Vale da Lama, Odiáxere, Lagos, SW Algarve, Portugal. It delivers experiential education and self-development programs for learners of all ages, including youth day and residential camps, customised programs for schools and groups, a Permaculture Design Course (PDC), and Ecosystem Regeneration Camps for advanced learners. Programs are held in English and Portuguese.
mission: To provide transformative educational and self-development experiences rooted in ecology, permaculture, and community for learners of all ages and backgrounds.
full_address: Campo do Vale, Quinta Vale da Lama, EM534, 8600-258 Odiáxere, Lagos, PORTUGAL
